authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife
U.S. Forest Service — Eldorado National Forest / Lake Tahoe Basin Management Unit (Desolation Wilderness)

sources.title: CCR T14 §5.85(a)(1) — Trout, General Statewide Regulations (inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds)
sources.quotedText: All inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds, including those on private lands, are open to fishing all year with a five-trout daily bag limit and ten-trout possession limit.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40 — Alphabetical List of Hatchery Trout, Hatchery Steelhead, and Salmon Waters with Special Fishing Regulations (Lake Doris not listed)
CCR T14 §7.50 — Alphabetical List of Trout Waters with Special Fishing Regulations (Lake Doris not listed)
2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (Updated 06/01/2026)
sources.quotedText: All inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds, including those on private lands, are open to fishing all year with a five-trout daily bag limit and 10 trout possession limit.

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon — CDFW (Lake Doris not listed)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: Desolation Wilderness — Eldorado National Forest, U.S. Forest Service
sources.quotedText: Permits are required. ... Maximum group size is 12 people for both day and overnight use. ... Campfires are prohibited in Desolation Wilderness to reduce human-caused fires, impacts to vegetation from firewood collection, and to reduce the visual impacts of fire rings and surface scarring. ... Travel is restricted to horseback or foot only.

parameters.note: Lake Doris is not listed in CCR §7.40(b) or §7.50(b), so as an inland lake it falls under the general statewide lake regulation §5.85(a)(1) — open to fishing all year. (Lake Doris is a lake, not a Tahoe tributary stream, so the §7.50(b)(152) Tahoe tributary closure does not apply.) Whether the lake actually holds fish is a separate question — see the species note below.

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year (general statewide lake regulation; not listed as a special-regulation water).
regulations.verbatimText: All inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds, including those on private lands, are open to fishing all year with a five-trout daily bag limit and ten-trout possession limit.

parameters.counting_rule: General statewide trout limit for inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds: five-trout daily bag limit and ten-trout possession limit.

regulations.humanSummary: 5 trout daily bag limit, 10 trout possession limit.
regulations.verbatimText: All inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds, including those on private lands, are open to fishing all year with a five-trout daily bag limit and ten-trout possession limit.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license. Lake Doris is wholly within California (El Dorado Co., Desolation Wilderness).

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+.
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.description: Lake Doris lies within the Desolation Wilderness (Eldorado National Forest / Lake Tahoe Basin Management Unit). A wilderness permit is required for both day use and overnight use; maximum group size is 12 people; campfires are prohibited; and travel is restricted to foot or horseback only.

regulations.citation: USFS Desolation Wilderness — Permits, Group Size, Campfires, Method of Travel
regulations.humanSummary: Access is in Desolation Wilderness: day-use and overnight wilderness permits required, group size limited to 12, campfires prohibited, foot/horseback travel only.
regulations.verbatimText: Permits are required. ... Maximum group size is 12 people for both day and overnight use. ... Campfires are prohibited in Desolation Wilderness ... Travel is restricted to horseback or foot only.
